overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City's bustling downtown district. The player navigates crowded sidewalks, crosses streets, and ascends stairs while surrounded by towering skyscrapers, holographic advertisements, and neon signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial sidewalk with arcades and holographic ads

events.description: approaching yellow-striped crosswalk to cross the street
stepping from sidewalk onto street crosswalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along busy sidewalk past pedestrians and storefronts with neon signage

entered.detail: large green and white commercial sign mounted on building facade
tall palm tree visible between buildings ahead
distinctive angular building with orange and white facade
glowing red and blue signage for various shops and arcades
futuristic sedan parked along the curb

segments.scene_description: Walking along a bustling cyberpunk sidewalk lined with neon arcades beneath the MARK 22 sign. The camera moves through moderate crowds of pedestrians and approaches a yellow-striped crosswalk, with palm trees and futuristic orange architecture visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with palm tree planters near transit station

events.description: exiting street crosswalk into sunlit open plaza area
passing by two individuals seated on concrete planter edge

agents.ego_description: crossing the plaza toward the stairs and Tom's Diner visible in the distance

notable_agents.action: two individuals sitting on planter edge conversing in the shade

entered.detail: large circular concrete planter with palm trees and seating
bright purple automated kiosk with glowing interface
large circular neon sign with red and white branding
orange illuminated sign for food establishment

segments.scene_description: Crossing into a sunlit open plaza featuring large palm tree planters and scattered pedestrians. The Tom's Diner neon sign becomes visible in the distance while passing a purple vending machine and seated NPCs relaxing near the planters.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street canyon with holographic billboards and diner facade

events.description: entering shadow cast by tall buildings while Tom's Diner sign becomes prominent
black sedan driving past on the street to the left

agents.ego_description: walking along street level past parked cars and towering building facades with holographic ads

notable_agents.action: black futuristic sedan driving along the street

entered.detail: multi-story parking structure with purple neon signage
massive floating advertisement displaying animated content between buildings
yellow and black striped traffic posts along the curb

segments.scene_description: Navigating an urban street canyon with the prominent Tom's Diner neon sign now on the left and the Kiroshi building visible ahead. The scene features massive holographic billboards floating between buildings, passing vehicles, and transitions from sunlight into building shadows.

scene_state.functional_zone: street crossing with ascending stairs to upper transit level

events.description: crossing street at yellow crosswalk with pedestrian signal
beginning ascent of wide concrete stairs to upper pedestrian walkway

agents.ego_description: crossing the street and climbing stairs to reach the elevated pedestrian level

notable_agents.action: man in white jacket descending stairs while looking at his phone

entered.detail: wide flight of concrete stairs with orange railings leading upward
red painted building structure with transit access doors

segments.scene_description: Crossing the street at a yellow crosswalk and beginning the ascent of wide concrete stairs to an upper pedestrian level. The red transit structure and Bradbury sign mark the entrance to the elevated walkway, with other pedestrians moving up and down the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered elevated walkway with food vendors

events.description: reaching top of stairs and entering covered pedestrian walkway
moving from bright sunlight into shaded covered area with artificial lighting

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered upper level transit area past food stands and vending machines

entered.detail: overhead concrete structure providing shade and cover
food vendor stall with illuminated signage and menu displays
blue and yellow automated kiosk for transit tickets

segments.scene_description: Reaching the top of the stairs and entering a covered elevated walkway with food vendor stalls and transit amenities. The lighting shifts from bright sunlight to artificial overhead lights as the camera moves through this sheltered pedestrian transit area.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a neon-lit street level through a sunlit plaza and finally into a sheltered elevated transit hub. It begins by weaving through crowds on a bustling sidewalk beneath the MARK 22 sign, moving past neon arcades toward a yellow-striped crosswalk. As the camera crosses the street, the environment opens into a bright plaza filled with palm tree planters and purple vending machines before shifting into a deep urban canyon dominated by the Tom's Diner sign and massive floating holographic billboards. The scene then transitions from bright sunlight into building shadows as the camera crosses another street and ascends a wide set of concrete stairs toward a red transit structure. Finally, the movement concludes as the camera reaches the top of the stairs and enters a covered walkway, where the natural light gives way to artificial overhead lighting among food vendor stalls.
